name: Awesome AI + Education
description: A bilingual awesome list of practical AI tools, open-source projects, and case studies for teaching, learning design, assessment, feedback, tutoring, curriculum design, school operations, and EdTech strategy.
inclusion_summary: Entries should support a concrete education workflow, make the AI role clear, identify target users, and provide public information that readers can evaluate.
exclusion_summary: The list excludes general AI literacy programs, generic AI courses, prompt packs without applied education workflows, and broad AI tools without clear education fit.
